## beehiiv newsletter-lists get

Get newsletter list <Badge intent="warning" minimal outlined>Beta</Badge> <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: newsletter_lists:read</Badge>

### Synopsis

Get newsletter list <Badge intent="warning" minimal outlined>Beta</Badge> <Badge intent="info" minimal outlined>OAuth Scope: newsletter_lists:read</Badge>

<Note title="Currently in beta" icon="b"> Newsletter Lists is currently in beta, the API is subject to change. Retrieve a single newsletter list belonging to a specific publication.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/newsletter_lists/{newsletterListId}

```
beehiiv newsletter-lists get <newsletterListId> [flags]
```
